title: Robin Meets Her Past
description: Aokiji arrives on Long Ring Long Land, shifting the mood from comedy to danger with one of the Navy’s strongest officers.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this scene focuses on Aokiji, Nico Robin, Luffy, Zoro, Sanji. Aokiji arrives on Long Ring Long Land, shifting the mood from comedy to danger with one of the Navy’s strongest officers.

dialogue.speaker: Aokiji
dialogue.text: I always uphold the model of

dialogue.speaker: Aokiji
dialogue.text: Then why were you sleeping while standing?()

dialogue.speaker: Aokiji
dialogue.text: I thought she would be with you.

dialogue.speaker: Aokiji
dialogue.text: You're really not here to pick fights?

dialogue.speaker: Aokiji
dialogue.text: I'm only going to report the discovery.

dialogue.speaker: Aokiji
dialogue.text: One more person will increase it by...

dialogue.speaker: Aokiji
dialogue.text: Let go of me!! Let me go!!

dialogue.speaker: Aokiji
dialogue.text: Don't start an unneces- sary fight!!

dialogue.speaker: Aokiji
dialogue.text: He's a "Supreme" Admiral for God's sake!!

dialogue.speaker: Aokiji
dialogue.text: I'm going to send you flying!!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Pack up and get ready to move.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: He's from the Marines! The Marines!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: This is no time for a joke!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: But that horse's leg is wounded.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: That doesn't sound con- Vincing at all....!!

summary: Aokiji arrives on Long Ring Long Land, shifting the mood from comedy to danger with one of the Navy’s strongest officers.
